input.question: Which course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?

payload.question: Which course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?

output.sql:
SELECT
  course_id AS course_id,
  section_id AS section_id,
  CONCAT(course_id, ' - ', section_id) AS section_label,
  enrolled AS enrolled,
  max_enrollment AS max_enrollment,
  CAST(enrolled AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(max_enrollment, 0) AS overbook_ratio
FROM course_sections
ORDER BY overbook_ratio DESC
LIMIT 10;

visualization.title: Top 10 Sections by Overbook Ratio (enrolled / max_enrollment)

payload.sql:
SELECT
  course_id AS course_id,
  section_id AS section_id,
  CONCAT(course_id, ' - ', section_id) AS section_label,
  enrolled AS enrolled,
  max_enrollment AS max_enrollment,
  CAST(enrolled AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(max_enrollment, 0) AS overbook_ratio
FROM course_sections
ORDER BY overbook_ratio DESC
LIMIT 10;
